overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a hooded character walking through a snowy Viking village at night, passing through a wooden gate, wading through a harbor with longships, and continuing along the shoreline. The scene features atmospheric snowfall, fire-lit wooden structures, and a misty waterfront environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy village path approaching wooden gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow between wooden buildings toward a large wooden gate structure

entered.detail: small wooden building with snow-covered thatched roof and warm interior light
tall wooden archway with vertical posts and horizontal beams marking village entrance
simple wooden pole fence lining the snowy path
deep snow covering the ground with visible footprints

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snowy village path flanked by wooden structures. A large wooden gate stands ahead against a dark purple night sky with light snowfall. The thatched roof hut on the left emits warm light, contrasting with the cool blue snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront approach with beached longships

events.description: passing through the wooden gate reveals the open waterfront and harbor with Viking longships

agents.ego_description: continuing down the snowy slope toward the water's edge where longships are beached

entered.detail: large wooden longship with carved prow beached on the shore, orange wood visible
second longship with dragon head prow partially visible in the mist
tall wooden posts sticking out of the water marking the harbor boundary
small burning fire on the beach providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: Exiting the village gate, the scene opens to a wide waterfront with mist hovering over the water. Two Viking longships rest on the shore, and small campfires dot the beach. The wooden pier posts stand silhouetted against the dark water as the character approaches the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow harbor water between beached longships

events.description: character steps from the snowy shore into the shallow water and begins wading
passing close to the hull of viking_longship_1 temporarily blocks view of the far shore

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep water, moving between the beached longships toward the opposite shore

notable_agents.action: figure standing in shallow water near the shore, appearing to fish or work with nets

entered.detail: large boulder covered in snow sitting in the shallow water near the shore
tall wooden tower with pointed spire visible in the distant village across the water

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dark water, wading between the massive longships. Mist rises from the water surface, and a distant church tower becomes visible across the harbor. Another figure stands in the water to the right, and snow-covered rocks emerge from the shallows as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy shoreline path along snow-covered village buildings

events.description: character exits the water and steps onto the muddy shore, continuing along the beach
passing by lit windows of wooden buildings creates warm light reflections on the wet ground

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the water onto the muddy shore and walking along the village edge

entered.detail: cluster of wooden houses with snow-covered roofs and warm glowing windows
tall pine trees covered in snow lining the edge of the village
wooden pier extending into the water with vertical support posts

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the water onto the muddy shore, the character walks along the village edge. Wooden buildings with glowing windows line the path, and snow-covered evergreen trees stand against the night sky. The church tower looms larger in the center view as the character moves deeper into the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, snowy village path that opens into a misty harbor before returning to the settlement's edge. It begins by following a hooded character through a corridor of wooden structures and thatched roofs under a dark purple sky, moving steadily toward a large wooden gate. As the character exits the gate, the scene expands into a wide waterfront where mist hovers over the water and campfires dot the beach beside resting longships. The camera then follows the character as they wade into the dark, shallow water between the massive ships, passing snow-covered rocks and a distant figure while a church tower emerges through the haze. Finally, the movement shifts back onto the muddy shore, gliding past glowing windows and snow-covered evergreens as the church tower looms larger in the center of the settlement.
